auth.checkEmailBody: Check your email — {{email}} — your access link will arrive shortly.
auth.loginSubtitle: We will send an access link to your email. No password required.
auth.errorGeneric: Could not send the link. Please check your email and try again.
auth.disclaimer: For users who have already consulted a CENPLAFAM/WOOMB certified instructor.

mucus.elastico_desc: Stretchy like egg white — near Peak

dayDetail.title: Day details
dayDetail.futureMessage: This day has not arrived yet. Record your observations when it does.
dayDetail.pastWarning: You are editing a past record. Changes will replace the original record.
dayDetail.describeWhatYouSeePlaceholder: E.g. flow with elastic mucus, pinkish color...
dayDetail.apiceDescription: Last day of lubricative or slippery sensation.
dayDetail.notesPlaceholder: What you observe / notes for your instructor...

linkInstructor.requestSuccess: Request sent successfully. Awaiting instructor approval.
linkInstructor.emptyStateBody: Search for your instructor by their registered email and send a request.
linkInstructor.disclaimer: Your instructor will receive a notification and must approve the connection before accessing your records.

notifications.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications. Consider using the app in a compatible browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari on iOS 16.4+).
notifications.blockedDescription: To receive notifications, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
notifications.granted: Push notifications enabled on this device
notifications.enableDescription: Enable notifications to receive recording reminders and alerts about instructor comments.
notifications.enablePrivacyNote: Notifications never contain clinical data from your cycle.
notifications.dailyReminderDesc: Receive a reminder to record your daily observations.
notifications.instructorCommentsDesc: Notify when your instructor adds a comment or review.
notifications.conflictResolutionDesc: Notify when your instructor reviews and resolves an observation.
notifications.privacyNotice: Notifications never contain clinical data from your cycle. Messages only indicate that new information is waiting for your attention in the app.
notifications.loginRequired: Log in to manage your notifications.

app.banner: Don't forget to record your observations for today
app.apiceDescLine1: Last day of lubricative or slippery sensation.
app.apiceDescLine2: From the 4th day after the Peak, the Luteal Phase begins.
app.confirmNewCycle: This will restart the chart from today. Confirm?
app.analysisBasedOn: Based on the last {{count}} recorded cycles
app.analysisMinCycles: Record at least 2 complete cycles to see the analysis.
app.pbiConfirmed: BIP confirmed in 3 consecutive cycles under 35 days with unchanged pattern.
app.pbiNotConfirmed: BIP still being confirmed. 3 consecutive cycles with unchanged pattern are required.
app.analysisDisclaimer: This analysis is a support tool for recording. Clinical interpretation of the cycle is the exclusive responsibility of the CENPLAFAM/WOOMB certified instructor.
app.guideNeedApiKey: Add your API key in the Profile tab to activate.
app.guideFAQ1: How do I record the Peak (✕)?
app.guideFAQ2: What is the BIP — Basic Infertility Pattern?
app.guideFAQ5: How to share with my instructor?
app.guideNeedApiKeyMsg: To use the AI Guide, add your Anthropic API key in the Profile tab.
app.whatsappMessage: Hello {{name}}! Here is my Billings Method chart for our consultation. Current cycle: day {{day}}, starting on {{date}}.
app.remindersDesc: Download the daily reminder to your calendar (iOS, Google, Outlook). The alarm will trigger at 9 PM every day.
app.apiKeyDesc: To use the AI Guide, enter your Anthropic API key. It is saved only on this device.
app.profileDisclaimer: This app should not be used by people who have not received training in the Billings Ovulation Method. Please consult an official instructor or CENPLAFAM – WOOMB BRASIL.
app.loginRequired: Log in to manage your notifications.
app.selectStampHint: Choose an observation above to save
app.noRecordsHint: Record today's observation in the Today tab.
app.noInstructorHint: Link with your instructor to share your records.

feedback.loginRequired: Log in to access community suggestions.
feedback.pageSubtitle: Share ideas and follow app improvements
feedback.emptyCategory: No suggestions in this category. Try another filter.
feedback.emptyAll: Be the first to submit a suggestion!
feedback.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
feedback.cardAriaLabel: Feedback: {{title}}. Status: {{status}}. Click to see details.
feedback.titleTooShort: Title must be at least {{min}} characters.
feedback.titleTooLong: Title can be at most {{max}} characters.
feedback.contentTooShort: Please describe with at least {{min}} characters.
feedback.contentTooLong: Content can be at most {{max}} characters.

pdf.disclaimer: This chart is a recording tool. Cycle interpretation is the exclusive responsibility of the CENPLAFAM/WOOMB certified instructor.
